species: Non-viable cells are the major source of intracellular contaminants in Jurkat cells.
cell_type: We report that biotinylating human cells with amine-reactive reagents intracellularly labels a small but reproducible population of nonviable cells.
sample_source: Primary human CD4+ T cells isolated from leukopaks exhibited an even higher frequency of biotinhigh cells...
cell_line: Using flow cytometry to optimize cell surface biotinylation conditions of Jurkat T cells...
